content:
Faust (Goethe’s Faust)
Students must debate the nature of a “deal with the devil” in literature & argue who actually wins.


📜 Rules for Defeating a Boss
✔ Some bosses require a single student to step forward and attempt the challenge.
✔ Others require a party-based challenge, where multiple students work together.
✔ Some challenges allow rerolls at the cost of XP, while others require a one-time commitment.

✅ Why This Works:
• Makes class structure feel like an adventure.
• Adds high-stakes engagement tied to literature.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 221 (chunk 221/555)
